# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: A custom user authentication plugin for WordPress.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Register new user
function custom_user_register($email, $password) {
    if (email_exists($email)) {
        return 'Email already exists.';
    }

    $user_id = wp_create_user($email, $password, $email);
    if (!is_wp_error($user_id)) {
        return 'User registered successfully.';
    } else {
        return 'Error registering user: ' . $user_id->get_error_message();
    }
}

// Login user
function custom_user_login($email, $password) {
    $user = get_user_by('email', $email);
    if (!$user || !wp_check_password($password, $user->user_pass, $user->ID)) {
        return 'Invalid email or password.';
    }

    wp_set_current_user($user->ID);
    wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID);
    do_action('wp_login', $user->user_login);

    return 'User logged in successfully.';
}

// Add shortcodes for registration and login
add_shortcode('custom_register_form', function() {
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <form method="post" action="">
        <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="Email" required>
        <input type="password" name="password" placeholder="Password" required>
        <input type="submit" value="Register">
    </form>
    <?php
    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST' && isset($_POST['email']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        $message = custom_user_register($_POST['email'], $_POST['password']);
        echo '<p>' . esc_html($message) . '</p>';
    }
    return ob_get_clean();
});

add_shortcode('custom_login_form', function() {
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <form method="post" action="">
        <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="Email" required>
        <input type="password" name="password" placeholder="Password" required>
        <input type="submit" value="Login">
    </form>
    <?php
    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST' && isset($_POST['email']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        $message = custom_user_login($_POST['email'], $_POST['password']);
        echo '<p>' . esc_html($message) . '</p>';
    }
    return ob_get_clean();
});
?>
